title: India News Live Today November 24, 2024: The rise and rise of BJP in Maharashtra
text:
Live
India News Live Today November 24, 2024: 'Arson, stone pelting, tear gas': What happened during Shahi Jama Masjid survey in Sambhal
Nov 24, 2024 11:25 AM IST
India News Live: Stay informed with our live blog covering India’s latest in politics, economy, crime, and general news. Get real-time updates on political developments, financial trends, crime reports, and important events across the country. Stay connected with the most crucial stories shaping India, all in one place.
Latest news on November 24, 2024: Security personnel keep vigil ahead of Friday prayers amid the ongoing controversy regarding the Jama Masjid in Uttar Pradesh's Sambhal district.
India News Live: Get real time updates on the latest happenings across India. From key political shifts and government decisions to economic developments and crime reports, we bring you real-time information as it unfolds. Our coverage also includes general news, spotlighting significant events and issues impacting daily life. Disclaimer: This is an AI-generated live blog and has not been edited by Hindustan Times staff....Read More
Follow all the updates here:
Nov 24, 2024 11:25 AM IST
India News Live: 'Arson, stone pelting, tear gas': What happened during Shahi Jama Masjid survey in Sambhal
- The survey was conducted on the order of a local court in connection with a petition which claimed that the mosque was built on the ruins of the Harihar temple.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/arson-stone-pelting-tear-gas-what-happened-during-shahi-jama-masjid-survey-in-sambhal-101732427281922.html)
Nov 24, 2024 11:01 AM IST
India News Live: Maharashtra: These 2 candidates are in running for chief minister's post
- Maharashtra results: Devendra Fadnavis, deputy chief minister and former CM, and Eknath Shinde, the current chief minister, emerging as the main contenders.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/maharashtra-candidates-devendra-fadnavis-eknath-shinde-running-for-chief-ministers-post-101732423087950.html)
Nov 24, 2024 10:58 AM IST
India News Live: UP: Mob throws stones at officials during Sambhal mosque survey
- In Sambhal, Uttar Pradesh, police resorted to baton charges during a contentious survey of Shahi Jama Masjid, which some claim was built over a Hindu temple.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/up-mob-throws-stones-at-officials-during-sambhal-mosque-survey-101732422867819.html)
Get LIVE updates on Maharashtra & Jharkhand election results. Know More.
Nov 24, 2024 9:41 AM IST
India News Live: Maharashtra results: In NCP vs NCP poll battle, Ajit Pawar trumps uncle Sharad Pawar
- Ajit Pawar defeated his nephew Yugendra Pawar, who was endorsed by 83-year-old Sharad Pawar, by a margin of over 1 lakh votes.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/maharashtra-results-in-ncp-vs-ncp-poll-battle-ajit-pawar-trumps-uncle-sharad-pawar-101732421068477.html)
Nov 24, 2024 9:08 AM IST
India News Live: Bypolls results: BJP shines in UP, Bihar; Congress wins Wayanad, Nanded Lok Sabha seats
- Assembly by-polls: In Assam, the BJP won three seats, while in Rajasthan, the BJP secured five out of seven assembly constituencies.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/in-assembly-by-polls-bjp-revives-in-up-shines-in-bihar-congress-scores-wayanad-nanded-look-sabha-seats-101732408468723.html)
Nov 24, 2024 9:00 AM IST
India News Live: Maharashtra election: How MVA and Mahayuti performed in Muslim-dominated seats
- The Maharashtra Assembly elections resulted in mixed outcomes in 11 constituencies with significant Muslim populations.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/maharashtra-election-how-mva-and-mahayuti-performed-in-muslim-dominated-seats-101732416298354.html)
Nov 24, 2024 8:00 AM IST
India News Live: Waqf Board Explainer: How much land it owns, its powers, what the govt wants to change and other questions answered
- What exactly is the Waqf Amendment Bill, how much property do the Waqf boards own, the litigation and controversy surrounding the boards' land and properties
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/waqf-board-explainer-how-much-land-it-owns-its-powers-what-the-govt-wants-to-change-and-other-questions-answered-101732365947161.html)
Nov 24, 2024 7:59 AM IST
India News Live: Maharashtra results: Nana Patole wins by 208 votes; several MVA stalwarts lose
- Maharashtra results: Shiv Sena leader Milind Deora was defeated by Aaditya Thackeray from the Worli seat.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/maharashtra-results-nana-patole-wins-by-208-votes-several-mva-stalwarts-lose-101732414853209.html)
Nov 24, 2024 7:00 AM IST
India News Live: Haryana Weather and AQI Today: Warm start at 17.7 °C, check weather forecast for November 24, 2024
- Check the weather forecast and air quality updates for Haryana on November 24, 2024 here.

India News Live: Jammu and Kashmir Weather and AQI Today: Cool start at -19.86 °C, check weather forecast for November 24, 2024
- Check the weather forecast and air quality updates for Jammu and Kashmir on November 24, 2024 here.

Nov 24, 2024 7:00 AM IST
India News Live: Himachal Pradesh Weather and AQI Today: Check weather forecast for November 24, 2024
- Check the weather forecast and air quality updates for Himachal Pradesh on November 24, 2024 here.

Nov 24, 2024 7:00 AM IST
India News Live: Goa Weather and AQI Today: Warm start at 19.21 °C, check weather forecast for November 24, 2024
- Check the weather forecast and air quality updates for Goa on November 24, 2024 here.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/goa-weather-today-aqi-and-rain-forecast-updates-november-24-2024-101732411828660.html)
Nov 24, 2024 6:57 AM IST
India News Live: BJP's vote share bigger than JMM in Jharkhand; 21 women candidates win in Maharashtra: Key takeaways
- In Maharashtra, the ruling alliance's final tally was 235. The MVA won 49 seats.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/bjps-vote-share-bigger-than-jmm-in-jharkhand-21-women-candidates-win-in-maharashtra-key-takeaways-101732410709389.html)
Nov 24, 2024 3:58 AM IST
India News Live: How parties fared across 5 regions of Maharashtra
- Experts attribute the Mahayuti victory to several factors, especially changing dynamics of the Maratha quota issue.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/how-parties-fared-across-5-regions-of-maharashtra-101732400621695.html)
Nov 24, 2024 3:20 AM IST
India News Live: The rise and rise of BJP in Maharashtra
- With 235 out of 288 assembly seats, the BJP-led Mahayuti alliance registered the biggest win in the state for any alliance or party since the 1972 election.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/the-rise-and-rise-of-bjp-in-maharashtra-101732398324085.html)
Nov 24, 2024 3:10 AM IST
India News Live: In battle of permutations, Mahayuti’s decisive blow
- The Opposition coalition Maha Vikas Aghadi (MVA) was decimated in the state elections, with its joint tally at 50.
[Read the full story here](https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/in-battle-of-permutations-mahayuti-s-decisive-blow-101732397729683.html)
